name: adr009-test-file-splitting
description: Split Mojo test files exceeding ADR-009 limit (≤10 fn test_ functions) to prevent heap corruption in Mojo v0.26.1. Use when: (1) a test file exceeds the fn test_ function limit, (2) CI shows non-deterministic heap corruption crashes in libKGENCompilerRTShared.so, (3) Models CI group fails intermittently.
